_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Headline 'RM9B for ships that do not exist' → 'RM6.08B spent, first ship in sea trials' with original RM9.13B/revised RM11.2B framing.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Boustead Naval Shipyard's accounts remain qualified' (specific audit-qualification claim not cited).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'RM1.4B in payments without matching work milestones' → 'RM1.4B in cost overruns and allocations used for purposes other than the LCS works' plus 'pembayaran melebihi kerja sebenar' (PAC wording).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'MACC investigation ongoing since 2022' → 'MACC investigation papers completed August 2022; former BNS MD charged with CBT involving RM21M'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'BNS not technically qualified' → 'weak finances, failed due diligence, direct-negotiation award' (PAC-supported wording).
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'DCNS withdrew' and 'replacement arrangements unclear' (Stage 3: by 2026 there is a revised contract; LUNAS conducting trials).

REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Malaysia's maritime patrol gap is a national security risk' → framed as 'serious defence and maritime-enforcement implications' (PAC-supported); analytical framing flagged.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'South China Sea incursions up 340% since 2019' → replaced with verified AG-cited 89 Chinese-vessel incursions 2016-2019.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'vessels meant to respond do not exist' → 'not yet been delivered to the navy; LCS1 in sea trials'.

REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Reframe 'not a procurement scandal, defence capability vacuum' (underclaims procurement scandal) → 'whether the revised contract, new payment terms and trial timeline will close the gap they opened'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Ocean is unpatrolled' → 'patrol functions rely on MMEA, RMN existing assets, Op Naga'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Analogy 'RM9 billion for empty lot' → 'RM6B against RM9B contract; partial hulls exist; renegotiated with same builder'.

CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'entity that failed to deliver is the same entity investigating the failure' → 'oversight came from PAC, National Audit, MACC, auditors' (BNS supplied testimony only).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — View 'system structurally unchanged' → 'PAC reports, declassification, MACC charges, contract restructure' (structural changes acknowledged); delivery is the remaining test.
CLEARED legacyAudit (rebuild complete per CLAUDE.md Accuracy Standard).
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): RM6.08B spent; programme started 2011; first delivery due 2019; progress payments based on timelines.
